feature_build: idempotent runtime-aware routing installation and migration

source_provenance.claim: Runtime selection uses CLI before SPECFLOW_RUNTIME and rejects missing or unknown non-interactive values before routing mutation.
source_provenance.verification: tests/contracts/runtime-routing-install.test.js checks precedence and byte-identical active/state files after invalid input.

source_provenance.claim: Fresh setup installs both profiles, activates the selected runtime, and records package version plus source and installed SHA-256 hashes.
source_provenance.verification: J-RUNTIME-ROUTING-INSTALL re-reads both templates, active model content, install-state.yml, and hashes for Codex and Claude Code.

source_provenance.claim: Managed reruns refresh or switch, semantically unchanged shipped profiles migrate, and custom routing remains byte-identical unless replacement is explicit.
source_provenance.verification: tests/contracts/runtime-routing-install.test.js asserts refreshed, switched, legacy_migrated, custom_routing_preserved, and explicit replacement paths.

source_provenance.claim: init, update, and run --setup-routing use the same installer without invoking a model provider.
source_provenance.verification: installer integration tests and temporary CLI execution returned installed/switched statuses; the shared installer imports no child-process provider launcher.

source_provenance.claim: Strict setup verification blocks missing, stale, or runtime-mismatched state and prints the exact replacement command.
source_provenance.verification: tests/contracts/runtime-routing-install.test.js changes managed routing and asserts stale_routing plus the exact repair command; installer tests exercise strict verification.

notes: No Claude or Codex provider is launched by routing installation. The attempted routed feature-build adapter failed at MCP authentication and was not treated as gate evidence.
